debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

failed_attempts:
induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp
          refine ⟨⟨idx1, by rw [List.length_append]; exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · induction l1 generalizing idx1 with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons x xs ih => cases idx1 <;> simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, *]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ idx =>
          simp at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx', H1, H2⟩ := IH hidx
          simp
          refine ⟨⟨hd.length + idx'.1, by simp; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · induction hd generalizing idx' with
            | nil => simp [H1]
            | cons x xs ih => simp [ih, Nat.succ_add, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [H2]
